message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.2.5, franken-* 0.2.5, frankensearch-* 0.1.1 and add MIT license

Workspace Cargo.toml: add license = "MIT" to [workspace.package] metadata.

Dependency updates in Cargo.lock:
- asupersync 0.2.3 -> 0.2.5 (switches from bincode to bincode-next)
- asupersync-macros 0.2.0 -> 0.2.5
- franken-decision 0.2.0 -> 0.2.5
- franken-evidence 0.2.0 -> 0.2.5
- franken-kernel 0.2.0 -> 0.2.5
- frankensearch-core 0.1.0 -> 0.1.1
- frankensearch-embed 0.1.0 -> 0.1.1
- frankensearch-index 0.1.0 -> 0.1.1 (drops wide 0.7, uses wide 1.1)
- toml 1.0.2 -> 1.0.3
- New transitive deps: bincode-next 2.1.0, bincode_derive-next 2.1.0,
  unty-next 0.1.0, virtue-next 0.1.0
- Removed: safe_arch 0.7.4, wide 0.7.33

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
